title: Binary data not found when uploading to Claude 3.5 API
symptom: When attempting to upload a .png file to the Claude 3.5 API, n8n returns 'No binary data set.' The subsequent node fails to find the binary file.
applies_when: Uploading binary data from a previous node
not_this_if: Binary data is correctly set in the previous node
Using a different API that handles binary data differently
root_cause: The error occurs because the binary data is not being referenced correctly in the workflow. Instead of using expressions to access the binary data, the correct field name should be used directly.
fix_steps: In the node where the binary data is referenced, remove any expressions and directly use the field name (e.g., 'data0').
Save the workflow and re-execute it.
agent_instruction: Directly reference the binary field by its name without using expressions.
